title: Glia-Free Cortical Neuronal Feeding Schedule - Neuronal Morphology
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9ag0e","text":"This protocol outlines the treatment of cortical neurons with astrocyte-conditioned medium (ACM) or spermidine and subsequent analysis of dendrite length. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"entcm","text":"Maintain sterility and avoid contamination during all steps.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"97i1v","text":"Follow institutional guidelines for the disposal of biological and chemical waste.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8gjng","text":"Penicillin-Streptomycin (10,000 U/mL) (Gibco, 15140148)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"am6bs","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"de9dm","text":"Sodium Pyruvate (GIBCO 11360)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6ppvc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"m4a9","text":"Neurobasal plus (Gibco, A35029-01)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":15}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cvnm7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"durni","text":"B27 plus (Gibco, A35828-01)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"71pje","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eurm0","text":"Forskolin (5 mM; 1000X) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a526e","text":"Add 12ml DMSO to 50 mg of Forskolin (Sigma, F6886).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"80r6t","text":"Make 20 ul aliquots; store -20˚C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fpuvf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8drht","text":"BDNF – (Peprotech, 450-02). Master stock should be prepared at 1mg/ml in 0.2%BSA DPBS and is stored at -80˚C as 100ul aliquots.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"310lc","text":"Preparation of 1000x Working Stocks","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":35}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ie9r","text":"Thaw on ice one master stock aliquot (100ul) of BDNF. Cool down on ice 2ml of filtered 0.2% BSA (Sigma A-8806) in DPBS solution. Add BDNF master stock aliquot to the BSA solution. Mix well but gently to avoiding foaming. Aliquot in 0.5ml tubes 20ul each, concentration 50ug/ml (1000X). Flash freeze the aliquots in liquid nitrogen and store at -80C. Working concentration: 50ng/ml, final concentration on neurons 25ng/ml.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":420,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fojkj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"u5hl","text":"CNTF – (Peprotech, 450-13). Master stock should be prepared at 1mg/ml in 0.2%BSA DPBS and is stored at -80˚C as 50ul aliquots.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ciq2i","text":"Preparation of 1000x Working Stocks","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":35}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"gm47","text":"Thaw on ice one master stock aliquot (100ul) of CNTF. Cool down on ice 2.5ml of filtered 0.2% BSA (Sigma A-8806) in DPBS solution. Add CNTF master stock aliquot to the BSA solution. Mix well but gently to avoiding foaming. Aliquot in 0.5ml tubes 20ul each, concentration 20ug/ml (1000X). Flash freeze the aliquots in liquid nitrogen and store at -80C. Working concentration: 20ng/ml, final concentration on neurons 10ng/ml.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":422,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9epgp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f7uu6","text":"Spermidine (Sigma, Cat# S2626)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"11u1u","text":"Master stock prepared at 500 mM in 0.1 M MOPS (pH 7, adjusted with KOH) and stored at -80°C as aliquots.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8n9a0","text":"Dilute in NGM to obtain an intermediate working stock. Mix well. Final concentration on neurons: 10 nM.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1evhn","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bvlu9","text":"Lipofectamine‱ 2000 Transfection Reagent (Invitrogen, Cat# 11668027)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":40}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":13,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"ehgri","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9plp1","text":"Opti-MEM (GIBCO, Cat# 11058021)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9mqeh","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3v4un","text":"Antibody Blocking Buffer - 150 mM NaCl, 50 mM Tris-Base, 1% BSA, 100 mM L-lysine. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":24}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2fgk","text":"In a 1L baker add 4.383g NaCl, 3.025g Tris-Base (Fisher, Cat. No: BP152-5), 5g BSA (Sigma, Cat. No:A2153) and 9.125g L-Lysine monohydrochloride (Sigma, Cat. No: L-1137). Add 350-400ml of ddH2O and mix well. Once mixed, adjust pH with HCl to 7.5. Finally, add 5ml of Sodium Azide (NaN3). Add ddH2O to final volume 500ml. Filter through 0.22μm filter and store 4C.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2ejai","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"58dq5","text":"VECTASHIELD Antifade Mounting Medium with DAPI (Vector Laboratories, Cat# H-1200-10).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":47}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c7vt7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9e3o5","text":"PFA 16% (Electron Microscopy Sciences, 19210)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c3lih","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"64lbf","text":"Normal Goat Serum (NGS) - (ThermoFisher 01-6201)   ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ca9k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"51tif","text":"Triton X-100 (Thermo Fisher, Cat# 28314)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":12}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"odrf","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bu66v","text":"Anti-GFP antibody (Aves Labs, Cat# GFP-1020, RRID:AB_10000240)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"n1cb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7rd29","text":"Goat anti-Chicken IgY (H+L) Secondary Antibody, Alexa Fluor 488 (Thermo Fisher, Cat# A-11039, RRID:AB_2534096)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":63}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"emoji","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"493C5F81CF6C11EFABFF0A58A9FEAC02","name":":tm:"}}}}
steps: This recipe makes 20ml of neuronal media. Make fresh per use
To a 50ml tube, add the following media components: %s %s Reagent Volume Neurobasal plus 19ml Pen/strep (100x) 200µl Sodium Pyruvate (100x) 200µl B27 plus (50x) 400µl

Sterile filter these components through a syringe filter. Place media in the incubator with cap unscrewed. Allow the media to warm and equilibrate for at least 45 minutes. (Media will have an orange color and bubbles)
Add growth factors right before the time to use the media. %s %s BDNF 20µl CNTF 20µl Forskolin 20µl
Neurons are extremely sensitive to environmental changes, so only half of the media is replaced.
Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope.
Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus + B27 plus according to recipe fresh + add AraC (1:10000). Let equilibrate for at least 45 min in the incubator with the cap unscrewed.
Remove 230µl of old neuronal media.
Add 250µl of fresh media.
Store in the incubator
Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope.
Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus + B27 plus according to recipe fresh. Let equilibrate for at least 45 min in the incubator with the cap unscrewed.
Remove 230µl of old neuronal media.
Add 250µl of fresh media.
Store in the incubator.
Check neurons for normal morphology under microscope.
Prepare Lipofectamine solution (per well): 100 μl Opti-MEM + 2 μl Lipofectamine. Pipet together and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .
Prepare DNA-Lipofectamine mixture: 100 μl Opti-MEM + 2 μl Lipofectamine + 2 μl of 0.5 μg/μl GFP plasmid. Pipet together and incubate for 00:05:00 at Room temperature .
Add the Lipofectamine solution (prepared in go to step #18 ) to the DNA-Lipofectamine mixture (prepared in go to step #19 ), mix and incubate for 00:20:00 at Room temperature .
Remove 300 μl of medium from neurons and save in sterile tube. Add 200 μl of transfection mixture to neurons. Incubate for 02:00:00 at 37 °C .
Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope.
Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus + B27 according to recipe fresh. Let equilibrate for at least 45 min in the incubator with the cap unscrewed.
Place the NGM on ice to cool down.
Thaw the ACM on ice.
Add the following to NGM depending on experimental condition: Condition Additive Final concentration 1 ACM ACM 100 ug/ml 2 Spermidine Spermidine 10 nM 3 Control Vehicle equivalent volume
Equilibrate and warm up the NGM with additive in the incubator ( 37 °C , 10% CO2) before adding it to the cells.
Remove 230µl of old neuronal media.
Add 250µl of fresh media.
Store in the incubator.
Check neurons for normal morphology under a microscope.
Prepare neuronal media with Neurobasal plus + B27 according to recipe fresh. Let equilibrate for at least 45 min in the incubator with the cap unscrewed.
Place the NGM on ice to cool down.
Thaw the ACM on ice.
Add the following to NGM depending on experimental condition: %s %s
Equilibrate and warm up the NGM with additive in the incubator ( 37 °C , 10% CO2) before adding it to the cells.
Remove 230µl of old neuronal media.
Add 250µl of fresh media.
Store in the incubator.

The following solutions should be prepared: a) 4% PFA in PBS – In a 50ml conical tube add one 16% PFA ampule (10ml), 26ml of ddH2O and 4ml of 10X PBS. Mix and place at 37˚C to warm up. For storing keep away from the light at 4C. b) Blocking and permeabilization solution (0.2% Triton) - This recipe makes 5ml of blocking solution, sufficient for 1 24-well plate. •2.4ml of antibody-blocking buffer •2.5ml of Normal Goat Serum (NGS) •100ul of 10% Triton. c) Primary antibodies solution: This recipe makes for 5ml, sufficient for 1 24-well plate. •4500µl Antibody blocking buffer •500µl Normal Goat Serum (NGS) •5ul of anti-GFP antibody
In a chemical fume hood, aspirate media from cells and immediately add 500µl of warm 4% PFA to each well.
Fix the neurons for 7 minutes at room temperature.
Wash 3 times with PBS.
Add 200ul of blocking solution to each well and block for 30min at room temperature.
Remove the blocking solution and add 200µl of primary antibody solution to each well. Incubate at 4˚C overnight.

a) Secondary antibodies solution: This recipe makes for 5ml, sufficient for 1 24-well plate. 4500µl Antibody blocking buffer 500µl Normal Goat Serum (NGS) 5ul of anti-Chicken IgY (H+L) Secondary Antibody, Alexa Fluor 488
Remove the primary antibody and wash 3 times with PBS
Add 200µl of secondary antibody solution to each well and incubate at room temperature for 3h, keeping it protected from light.
Wash 3 times with PBS.
Mount coverslips onto slides using one small drop of VECTASHIELD Antifade Mounting Medium with DAPI.
Seal with nail polish and dry at room temp for at least 30min before storing at 4˚C.
Transfect neurons with GFP plasmid, using Lipofectamine 2000.
Remove all medium from neurons. Add 50% saved medium and 50% new medium. Return neurons to incubator.
Acquire images using a fluorescence microscope (e.g. Keyence BZ-X800) at 20x magnification.
Manually analyze dendrite length using the NeuronJ plugin within the FIJI software.
creator: Sarah van Veen
